description: Scientific visualization task: Import the Caffeine molecule PDB file from /home/ga/Documents/caffeine.pdb and style the atoms for a publication figure using balls and sticks geometry. Set Carbon atoms to matte black (roughness 1.0) and Oxygen atoms to glowing red (Emission Strength >= 5.0). Render the final image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/caffeine_viz.png and save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/molecular_setup.blend.
